title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. alpicola
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. alpicola, also known as alpine kidney vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of alpine kidney vetch include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to improve cardiovascular health and boost the immune system. Alpine kidney vetch can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
